economic_notes: First Nation operates a store enterprise, limited partnerships (Sturgeon Lake First Nation Developments LP and Sturgeon Lake Property LP), and GBEs (Sturgeon Lake Developments Ltd., Sturgeon Lake TLE Land Holding Corp., Sturgeon Lake Property Ltd.). Agricultural operations including cattle (103 cows, 12 bulls). Treaty Land Entitlement revenue account active.
notes: Comparative 2022 figures have been restated per Note 30. Four entities consolidated: SLFN Operations, CMHC Housing Fund, Store Enterprise, TLE Revenue Account. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Two limited partnerships (99.9999% owned) also under modified equity method. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $1,895,360 plus due to related parties $282,643. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $37,839,784 + PAGC $1,373,777 + First Nations Trust $1,109,654 + CMHC $473,217 + SIIT $438,484 + Ottawa Trust $387,674 + Indigenous Languages & Culture $285,000 + TLE Revenue $178842 + Northern Lights $139,250 = $42,225,682. OSR = total revenue $45,938,168 minus government transfers $42,225,682 minus deferral adjustment = approximately $3,712,486 (store sales + other revenue + admin fees + LP earnings + rental income + GBE loss). Annual debt service is repayment of long term debt per cash flow statement.
